message:
fix(tools): correct JSON schema types from number to integer

Fix tool parameter schema definitions where whole-number parameters
were incorrectly typed as "number" (allows floats) instead of "integer":

- ReadTool: offset, limit
- BashTool: timeout
- GrepTool: context, limit
- FindTool: limit
- LsTool: limit

These parameters only accept whole numbers and the integer type
constraint ensures proper validation by schema-aware consumers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
